Name: Stone, Sky, Sea - AAC LHW M1 (Savage)
Description:
“<If(PlayerParameter(4))>She<Else/>He</If> who would entertain the fantastical imaginings of a celebrated cartoonist to relive perilous matches against superpowered soulshifters is either great warrior or great fool.”

Embrace the esoterics of electrope engineers and destroy the striking dummy within the time limit!
